description: Smart LLM router with x402 micropayments - fork of ClawRouter with 92% cost savings

expectedBehaviors.justification: IgniteRouter uses this wallet key to sign USDC payment transactions on Base L2. The key is used LOCALLY for cryptographic signing and is NEVER transmitted over the network. This is required for x402 protocol compliance.
Routes LLM requests to various providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, etc.) via their APIs. This is the core functionality of the router.
Runs diagnostic commands for troubleshooting and health checks.

securityNotes: The wallet key is used solely for EIP-712 signature generation
Signatures are transmitted, not the private key itself
Users fund their own wallets - IgniteRouter does not custody funds
All payment signing happens client-side in the proxy
Source code is MIT licensed and fully auditable
Fork of ClawRouter - see IGNITEROUTER.md for upstream sync info
